summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: WebSurfer repeatedly failed to directly verify the quote in the article and instead gave unsupported summaries before finally asserting a match without evidence, so the system ended with weak/no verification and some repeated prompting (e.g., repeated requests to “carefully search” for the exact phrase).
